complaint: When I turn on the heater or AC there's an electrical burning plastic smell and the fan only blows on the highest setting, I shut it off because I thought it would start a fire.
observations: Hot electrical odor at vents, blower runs only on speed 4
No fan output on speeds 1-3, fan motor itself spins freely
